name: Conversation Commitments v1 — API CRUD proof
verdict_rule: npm run lifeos:commitments:slice-proof exits 0 → COMPLETE; else NOT COMPLETE
scope_in: Canonical API only: /api/v1/lifeos/commitments via lifeos-core-routes + commitment-tracker.js + commitments table
Manual POST → GET list → mark kept (done) → mark broken → snooze (deferred v1)
Mechanical HTTP proof against PUBLIC_BASE_URL (production path)
scope_out: Calendar, Sherry share, audio, therapy interpretation

build_tasks_if_fail.do: Fix lifeos-core-routes + commitment-tracker logCommitment; ensure commitments migration applied on Neon
Fix getOpen filter / user resolver for adam
